name: GP FTE
description: Full-time equivalent general practitioners delivering primary care services.

name: GP Headcount
description: Total number of general practitioners, regardless of hours worked.

name: Bulk Billing Rate
description: Proportion of GP consultations billed directly to Medicare without patient co-payment.

name: GP-to-Population Ratio
description: Number of general practitioners per 1,000 population in a given region.

name: Average Weekly Clinical Hours
description: Mean clinical hours worked per week by general practitioners.

name: After-Hours Service Coverage
description: Percentage of PHN regions with accessible after-hours primary care services meeting MBS criteria.

name: RN FTE
description: Full-time equivalent registered nurses across all care settings.

name: EN Headcount
description: Total number of enrolled nurses in the workforce.

name: Nurse Practitioner Count
description: Number of endorsed nurse practitioners authorised to prescribe and manage patient care independently.

name: Nursing Vacancy Rate
description: Proportion of funded nursing positions that are unfilled at a given time.

name: Agency Nursing Spend
description: Total expenditure on agency-sourced nursing staff, excluding permanent employees.

name: Midwife FTE
description: Full-time equivalent registered midwives providing antenatal, birthing, and postnatal care.

name: Physiotherapist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent physiotherapists providing musculoskeletal and rehabilitation services.

name: Occupational Therapist Headcount
description: Total number of occupational therapists across public and private settings.

name: Psychologist-to-Population Ratio
description: Number of registered psychologists per 100,000 population.

name: Pharmacist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent pharmacists in community and hospital settings.

name: Dental Practitioner Headcount
description: Total number of registered dentists and dental specialists.

name: Podiatrist Headcount
description: Total number of registered podiatrists and podiatric surgeons.

name: MMM Classification
description: Modified Monash Model category (1-7) indicating remoteness of a geographic location for workforce incentive purposes.

name: PHN Region
description: Primary Health Network boundary used to aggregate and report workforce supply and demand data.

name: ASGC-RA Category
description: Australian Standard Geographical Classification Remoteness Area (1-5) assigned to a statistical area.

name: DPA Status
description: Distribution Priority Area designation indicating regions with insufficient GP workforce for Medicare provider number restrictions.

name: Workforce Shortage Indicator
description: Binary flag indicating whether a PHN region meets the threshold criteria for a declared workforce shortage.

name: SA3 Workforce Supply Score
description: Composite score of workforce supply across all practitioner types for a Statistical Area Level 3.

name: Telehealth Consultation Rate
description: Proportion of primary care consultations delivered via telehealth platforms within a PHN region.

name: Medical Student Enrolments
description: Total domestic and international medical students enrolled in accredited Australian medical schools.

name: Prevocational Training Positions
description: Number of funded intern and PGY2 positions across hospital training networks.

name: GP Registrar Count
description: Number of doctors currently enrolled in a RACGP or ACRRM general practice training program.

name: Overseas-Trained Practitioner Registrations
description: Number of internationally qualified health practitioners granted registration under the National Registration framework.

name: Fellowship Completion Rate
description: Proportion of GP registrars who achieve Fellowship within seven years of commencing vocational training.

name: GP Turnover Rate
description: Proportion of GPs leaving a PHN region or practice within a 12-month period.

name: GP Retirement Rate
description: Annual rate at which GPs aged 55 and over leave active clinical practice permanently.

name: Female GP Proportion
description: Share of the GP workforce identifying as female, used to model part-time working patterns and succession planning.

name: Average Consultation Duration
description: Mean length of a face-to-face general practice consultation in minutes.

name: Mental Health Treatment Plan Rate
description: Number of GP Mental Health Treatment Plans prepared per 1,000 population annually.

name: Chronic Disease Management Item Rate
description: Rate of MBS care planning items (721/723/732) claimed per 1,000 eligible chronic disease patients.

name: Practice Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent practice nurses employed in general practice settings under GP supervision.

name: Rural GP Incentive Payment Recipients
description: Count of GPs receiving incentive payments under Rural Health Multidisciplinary Training or comparable Commonwealth programs.

name: Procedural GP Proportion
description: Share of GPs providing procedural services including obstetrics, anaesthetics, or minor surgery in rural settings.

name: Solo Practice Proportion
description: Proportion of GPs working in single-practitioner practices, indicating potential service fragility or limited after-hours capacity.

name: New GP Entrants
description: Number of doctors achieving Fellowship of RACGP or ACRRM and entering the GP workforce in a calendar year.

name: Mixed Billing Rate
description: Proportion of GP consultations where a patient co-payment is charged above the Medicare rebate.

name: GP Locum Dependency Rate
description: Proportion of GP service hours delivered by locum practitioners rather than substantive staff.

name: GP Telehealth Uptake Rate
description: Share of GP consultations delivered via telephone or video rather than face-to-face.

name: ATSI Health Assessment Rate
description: Number of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander health assessments (MBS 715) claimed per 1,000 eligible Indigenous population.

name: Enhanced Primary Care Allied Health Referral Rate
description: Average number of allied health referrals made per GP under Enhanced Primary Care arrangements per year.

name: GP Workforce Age Distribution
description: Proportion of GPs aged over 55, used as an indicator of near-term retirement succession risk in a region.

name: After-Hours Home Visit Rate
description: Number of MBS after-hours home visit items claimed per 1,000 population in a PHN region.

name: Patient Continuity of Care Score
description: Average proportion of a patient's GP visits seen by their nominated usual GP in a 12-month period.

name: ICU Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent registered nurses working in intensive care and critical care units.

name: Perioperative Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent nurses working in operating theatres, anaesthetic bays, and recovery rooms.

name: Mental Health Nurse Headcount
description: Total number of registered nurses holding a postgraduate qualification in mental health nursing.

name: Community Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent registered nurses providing care in community and domiciliary settings.

name: Practice Nurse Headcount
description: Total number of nurses employed in general practice settings under GP oversight.

name: Clinical Nurse Specialist Count
description: Number of nurses in designated clinical nurse specialist or clinical nurse consultant roles.

name: Nurse Educator Count
description: Total number of nurses in educator, preceptor, or professional development roles across health settings.

name: Nursing Turnover Rate
description: Proportion of nursing staff who resign or leave their position within a 12-month period.

name: Nurse-to-Occupied-Bed Ratio
description: Average number of registered nurses per occupied acute care bed across public hospitals.

name: Nursing Overtime Hours
description: Total overtime hours worked by nursing staff per full-time equivalent per fortnight.

name: Nursing Student Clinical Placements
description: Number of funded undergraduate nursing student placement days per annum across clinical sites.

name: Casual Nursing Employment Rate
description: Proportion of nursing workforce employed on casual or irregular hours contracts.

name: Remote Area Nurse Count
description: Total number of registered nurses deployed in remote and very remote area health services.

name: Palliative Care Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses with specialist palliative care endorsement across all settings.

name: Paediatric Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent nurses working in dedicated paediatric wards and children's hospitals.

name: Diabetes Educator Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses credentialled by the Australian Diabetes Educators Association.

name: Wound Management Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses holding a wound management or tissue viability specialist qualification.

name: Infection Prevention Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses in designated infection control and prevention roles across health settings.

name: Nurse Immuniser Count
description: Number of registered nurses authorised to administer vaccines under immunisation protocols.

name: Graduate Nurse Transition Rate
description: Proportion of graduate nurses who remain in the health system 12 months after commencing their transition program.

name: First Nations Nurse Proportion
description: Share of the nursing workforce who identify as Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander.

name: Nursing AHPRA Registrations
description: Total active AHPRA registrations held by registered nurses and enrolled nurses nationally.

name: Stomal Therapy Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses with recognised stomal therapy specialist qualifications in clinical practice.

name: Nursing Agency Cost per Shift
description: Average cost per shift of agency nursing staff compared to the equivalent substantive employment cost.

name: Speech Pathologist Count
description: Total number of registered speech pathologists across hospital, community, and private settings.

name: Dietitian FTE
description: Full-time equivalent accredited practising dietitians in clinical and community nutrition roles.

name: Social Worker Headcount
description: Total number of social workers in health settings registered with the Australian Association of Social Workers.

name: Radiographer FTE
description: Full-time equivalent diagnostic radiographers across public and private medical imaging services.

name: Sonographer Count
description: Total number of accredited sonographers providing diagnostic ultrasound services.

name: Medical Laboratory Scientist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent scientists performing diagnostic pathology and laboratory testing.

name: Optometrist Headcount
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered optometrists providing eye health services.

name: Audiologist Count
description: Total number of practising audiologists providing hearing assessment and rehabilitation services.

name: Exercise Physiologist Count
description: Total number of accredited exercise physiologists providing chronic disease management and rehabilitation services.

name: Aboriginal Health Practitioner Headcount
description: Total number of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Health Practitioners registered under AHPRA.

name: Orthoptist Count
description: Total number of registered orthoptists providing assessment and treatment for eye movement and vision disorders.

name: Prosthetist and Orthotist Count
description: Total number of accredited prosthetists and orthotists providing assistive devices and clinical services.

name: Perfusionist Count
description: Total number of clinical perfusionists operating cardiopulmonary bypass and extracorporeal circuits.

name: Genetic Counsellor Count
description: Total number of practising genetic counsellors certified by the Human Genetics Society of Australasia.

name: Music Therapist Count
description: Total number of registered music therapists providing evidence-based therapeutic services.

name: Art Therapist Count
description: Total number of registered art therapists providing clinical therapeutic services across health and community settings.

name: Welfare Worker Headcount
description: Total number of welfare workers in community health and social support roles.

name: Osteopath Headcount
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered osteopaths providing musculoskeletal care.

name: Chiropractor Headcount
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered chiropractors providing spinal and musculoskeletal care.

name: Chinese Medicine Practitioner Count
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered Chinese medicine practitioners including acupuncturists.

name: Health Promotion Officer Count
description: Total number of health promotion officers delivering preventive health programs in community and PHN settings.

name: Clinical Psychologist Count
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered psychologists with endorsement in clinical psychology.

name: Neuropsychologist Count
description: Total number of psychologists with endorsement in clinical neuropsychology providing cognitive assessment services.

name: Allied Health Assistant Count
description: Total number of allied health assistants supporting qualified allied health practitioners across all settings.

name: Rehabilitation Counsellor Count
description: Total number of accredited rehabilitation counsellors supporting return-to-work and vocational rehabilitation programs.

name: Diabetes Educator (Allied Health) Count
description: Total number of non-nurse allied health professionals credentialled as diabetes educators by ADEA.

name: Clinical Pharmacologist Count
description: Total number of specialists in clinical pharmacology providing medicines advisory and safety services.

name: Radiation Therapist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent radiation therapists delivering therapeutic radiation treatment in oncology settings.

name: Nuclear Medicine Technologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent nuclear medicine technologists performing diagnostic imaging using radioactive tracers.

name: RRMA Category
description: Rural, Remote and Metropolitan Area classification (1-7) used for historical workforce incentive and policy mapping.

name: ARIA+ Score
description: Accessibility/Remoteness Index of Australia Plus score indicating road distance from service centres.

name: PHN Catchment Population
description: Total estimated residential population within a Primary Health Network boundary.

name: SA2 Workforce Access Score
description: Composite index measuring geographic access to primary health services at Statistical Area Level 2.

name: SEIFA IRSD Score
description: Index of Relative Socio-economic Disadvantage score for a Statistical Area, used to weight workforce need calculations.

name: Cross-Border Service Utilisation Rate
description: Proportion of health service episodes delivered to patients residing outside the PHN boundary.

name: Population Aging Index
description: Proportion of the PHN population aged 65 and over, indicating aged care and chronic disease workforce demand.

name: CALD Population Proportion
description: Proportion of PHN population who speak a language other than English at home, informing interpreter and cultural need.

name: Indigenous Population Proportion
description: Proportion of PHN population identifying as Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander.

name: Population Growth Rate (5-Year)
description: Compound annual growth rate of the resident population over the preceding five-year ABS Census period.

name: Potentially Preventable Hospitalisation Rate (Geographic)
description: Rate of potentially preventable hospital admissions per 1,000 population for a geographic region.

name: GP Access Index
description: Composite score combining GP-to-population ratio, bulk billing rate, and after-hours availability for a geographic area.

name: Health Service Utilisation Rate
description: Total MBS and hospital service episodes per 1,000 population in a geographic region per annum.

name: Nursing Graduate Numbers
description: Total domestically trained nursing graduates awarded registration by AHPRA in a calendar year.

name: Allied Health Graduate Numbers
description: Combined total of allied health graduates entering the workforce across all registered and accredited disciplines.

name: Rural Clinical School Enrolments
description: Number of medical students undertaking rural clinical placements through accredited Rural Clinical Schools.

name: GAMSAT Mean Score (Domestic)
description: Average GAMSAT score of domestic applicants entering graduate-entry medical programs nationally.

name: Specialist Training Program Positions
description: Number of funded specialist training positions approved by the Commonwealth for hospital-based specialty training.

name: IMG Assessment Pathway Duration
description: Median time in months for an internationally qualified medical graduate to complete comparability assessment and achieve registration.

name: PGY1 Match Rate
description: Proportion of domestic medical graduates matched to an intern training position in their preferred state.

name: ACRRM Fellowship Completions
description: Annual number of doctors completing Fellowship of the Australian College of Rural and Remote Medicine.

name: Dental Graduate Numbers
description: Total dentistry graduates entering the workforce from accredited Australian dental schools annually.

name: Pharmacist Graduate Numbers
description: Total pharmacy graduates awarded provisional registration by AHPRA in a calendar year.

name: Psychology Internship Positions
description: Number of funded supervised internship positions available for provisional psychologists seeking general registration.

name: Mental Health Nursing Postgraduate Enrolments
description: Number of nurses enrolled in a postgraduate mental health nursing qualification at an accredited institution.

name: Rural Training Pipeline Completion Rate
description: Proportion of doctors completing a rural-focused training pathway who remain in rural practice after three years.

name: International Medical Graduate Support Program Participants
description: Number of IMGs enrolled in structured orientation and supervised practice programs prior to independent practice.

name: Continuing Medical Education Compliance Rate
description: Proportion of medical practitioners meeting annual CME and CPD requirements set by their specialist college.

name: Psychiatrist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent specialist psychiatrists providing acute, community, and private mental health care.

name: Psychiatrist-to-Population Ratio
description: Number of psychiatrists per 100,000 population in a PHN region.

name: Clinical Psychologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent psychologists with clinical endorsement delivering evidence-based psychological therapies.

name: Mental Health Social Worker Count
description: Total number of mental health social workers accredited under MHPN and providing Better Access services.

name: Mental Health Occupational Therapist Count
description: Total number of occupational therapists with a mental health specialisation delivering clinical services.

name: headspace Centre FTE
description: Full-time equivalent staff across headspace centres providing youth mental health services for ages 12-25.

name: Better Access Sessions Delivered
description: Total number of individual psychological therapy sessions delivered under MBS Better Access items in a PHN.

name: Acute Mental Health Bed Count
description: Total number of funded acute inpatient mental health beds across public and private facilities.

name: PICU Beds
description: Total number of Psychiatric Intensive Care Unit beds for high-dependency psychiatric admissions.

name: Community Mental Health Team FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinicians in community-based mental health case management and assertive outreach teams.

name: Alcohol and Other Drug Counsellor Count
description: Total number of AOD counsellors delivering treatment in residential and community settings.

name: Peer Support Worker Count
description: Total number of trained lived-experience peer support workers in mental health services.

name: Mental Health Nurse Prescriber Count
description: Number of mental health nurses authorised to prescribe scheduled medicines under approved protocols.

name: Early Psychosis Intervention FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinicians in early psychosis intervention programs targeting the 15-25 age group.

name: Eating Disorder Clinician Count
description: Total number of clinicians in designated eating disorder treatment roles across inpatient and outpatient settings.

name: Crisis Assessment Team FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinicians in telephone and mobile crisis assessment and triage services.

name: Forensic Mental Health Worker Count
description: Total number of clinicians working in forensic psychiatric units and court liaison services.

name: Child and Adolescent Mental Health FTE
description: Full-time equivalent CAMHS clinicians across community, outpatient, and inpatient settings.

name: Perinatal Mental Health Clinician Count
description: Total number of clinicians specialised in mental health conditions arising during pregnancy and the postnatal period.

name: Transcultural Mental Health Worker Count
description: Total number of bilingual clinicians and cultural consultants in transcultural mental health services.

name: Suicide Prevention Program FTE
description: Full-time equivalent staff in funded suicide prevention, postvention, and safe messaging programs.

name: Psychosocial Support Worker Count (NDIS)
description: Number of NDIS-registered workers delivering psychosocial recovery coaching and support services.

name: Private Psychiatry Beds
description: Total number of funded inpatient psychiatric beds in private hospital settings.

name: Mental Health Day Program Places
description: Funded day program places in structured community-based mental health rehabilitation programs.

name: Consultation-Liaison Psychiatry FTE
description: Full-time equivalent consultation-liaison psychiatrists embedded in general hospital settings.

name: Mental Health Rehabilitation Worker Count
description: Total workers in residential and community mental health rehabilitation and recovery services.

name: CBT-Trained Clinician Count
description: Number of mental health clinicians with verified cognitive behavioural therapy training and accreditation.

name: Digital Mental Health Platform Users
description: Registered users of publicly funded digital mental health platforms such as This Way Up and MindSpot.

name: Mental Health Workforce Vacancy Rate
description: Proportion of funded mental health positions that are currently unfilled across all settings.

name: Step-Up Step-Down Beds
description: Total number of residential step-up and step-down mental health beds providing transitional support outside hospital.

name: Aged Care Worker FTE
description: Full-time equivalent workers across all roles in residential and home care aged care settings.

name: Personal Care Worker Headcount
description: Total number of personal care workers and support workers in aged care settings.

name: Residential Aged Care Beds
description: Total number of operational residential aged care beds approved under the Aged Care Act.

name: Home Care Package Recipients
description: Total number of approved Commonwealth Home Care Package recipients receiving funded care.

name: CHSP Service Hours Delivered
description: Total hours of Commonwealth Home Support Programme services delivered in a region per annum.

name: Registered Nurse in Aged Care FTE
description: Full-time equivalent registered nurses working in residential aged care facilities.

name: Nurse-to-Resident Ratio (Aged Care)
description: Average number of nurses per resident across residential aged care facilities in a region.

name: Aged Care Worker Turnover Rate
description: Annual proportion of aged care workers who leave their current employer.

name: Geriatrician FTE
description: Full-time equivalent geriatricians providing specialist assessment and care for older people.

name: Dementia Specialist Worker Count
description: Total number of aged care workers with specialist dementia training and endorsement.

name: Aged Care Pharmacist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent pharmacists providing residential medication management reviews in aged care settings.

name: Aged Care Physiotherapist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent physiotherapists delivering rehabilitative and fall-prevention services in aged care.

name: Aged Care Occupational Therapist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent occupational therapists supporting functional independence in aged care settings.

name: Dietitian in Aged Care FTE
description: Full-time equivalent dietitians delivering nutritional assessment and intervention in aged care.

name: Social Worker in Aged Care Count
description: Total number of social workers providing psychosocial support and discharge planning in aged care.

name: Lifestyle Officer Count
description: Total number of activities and lifestyle officers delivering engagement programs in residential aged care.

name: Palliative Care in Aged Care FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinicians delivering specialist palliative care in residential aged care settings.

name: Aged Care Manager Count
description: Total number of facility and service managers responsible for governance of aged care services.

name: Worker Qualification Rate (Cert III+)
description: Proportion of direct aged care workers holding a Certificate III or higher in aged or individual support.

name: Casual Employment Rate (Aged Care)
description: Proportion of the aged care workforce employed on casual or irregular contracts.

name: Annual Training Hours per Aged Care Worker
description: Average number of formal training hours per aged care worker per year.

name: ACFI Funding per Resident per Day
description: Average Aged Care Funding Instrument payment per occupied bed per day across a region.

name: Transition Care Places
description: Total number of funded transition care program places supporting hospital discharge for older patients.

name: Specialist Aged Care Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses with a specialist qualification in gerontic nursing or aged care.

name: Continence Nurse Count
description: Total number of nurses holding a continence management specialist qualification in aged care settings.

name: First Nations Aged Care Worker Proportion
description: Share of the aged care workforce who identify as Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander.

name: Respite Care Places
description: Number of funded respite care places available in a PHN region across residential and community-based settings.

name: Consumer Directed Care Adoption Rate
description: Proportion of home care recipients directing their own care budget under consumer directed care arrangements.

name: Aged Care Quality Rating (Staff Domain)
description: Average workforce-related quality domain score from Aged Care Quality and Safety Commission assessments.

name: Carer Support Worker Count
description: Total number of carer support workers providing in-home services to unpaid carers of older Australians.

name: Hospital Medical Officer FTE
description: Full-time equivalent hospital medical officers from intern to fellow level in public hospital settings.

name: Specialist Medical Officer Count
description: Total number of VMO and salaried specialist medical officers providing services at a public hospital.

name: Public Hospital Bed Count
description: Total number of operational acute, subacute, and psychiatric beds in public hospitals.

name: Overnight Occupied Bed Days
description: Total bed days occupied by overnight inpatient admissions across a health service in a 12-month period.

name: Bed Occupancy Rate
description: Proportion of available overnight beds occupied at a given point in time or averaged over a reporting period.

name: ICU Bed Count
description: Total number of intensive care unit beds classified at Level 4 or higher standard.

name: Emergency Department FTE
description: Full-time equivalent emergency physicians, registrars, and nurses in public hospital emergency departments.

name: Emergency Nurse Practitioner Count
description: Total number of nurse practitioners with ED endorsement providing autonomous emergency care.

name: Anaesthetist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent specialist anaesthetists and anaesthetic trainees in public hospital settings.

name: Surgeon FTE
description: Full-time equivalent surgeons across all surgical subspecialties in public hospital settings.

name: Obstetrician FTE
description: Full-time equivalent obstetricians and gynaecologists providing public hospital maternity services.

name: Paediatrician FTE
description: Full-time equivalent general and subspecialty paediatricians in public hospitals.

name: Radiologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent diagnostic and interventional radiologists reporting for public hospital imaging services.

name: Pathologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent pathologists providing diagnostic laboratory services to public hospitals.

name: Intensivist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent intensive care specialists providing critical care services.

name: Medical Oncologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent medical oncologists providing systemic cancer treatment in public hospitals.

name: Radiation Oncologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent radiation oncologists providing radiotherapy services in public facilities.

name: Cardiologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent cardiologists providing general and interventional cardiac services.

name: Neurologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent neurologists providing inpatient and outpatient neurology services.

name: Hospital Pharmacist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent pharmacists in clinical and dispensing roles within hospital settings.

name: Hospital-Acquired Complication Rate
description: Rate of hospital-acquired complications per 1,000 separations across a hospital or health service.

name: Average Length of Stay (Acute)
description: Mean number of days per acute inpatient episode across a hospital or health network.

name: Elective Surgery Waiting Time (Median)
description: Median days from addition to the elective surgery waiting list to procedure date.

name: Emergency Department 4-Hour Rule Compliance
description: Proportion of ED presentations seen and treated within four hours under the National Emergency Access Target.

name: 30-Day Readmission Rate
description: Proportion of inpatients readmitted to a hospital within 30 days of a previous discharge.

name: Theatre Utilisation Rate
description: Proportion of booked operating theatre time that is used for planned surgical procedures.

name: Clinical Coder FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinical coders responsible for diagnostic and procedural coding of patient episodes.

name: Health Information Manager Count
description: Total number of health information managers overseeing data, records, and clinical coding functions.

name: Cardiac Technician Count
description: Total number of cardiac technology scientists performing ECG, Holter monitoring, and cardiac function tests.

name: Sterilisation Technician Count
description: Total number of CSSD technicians reprocessing surgical instruments and medical devices.

name: Hospital Social Worker FTE
description: Full-time equivalent social workers providing discharge planning and psychosocial support in hospitals.

name: Outpatient Clinic FTE
description: Full-time equivalent clinical staff delivering specialist and allied health outpatient clinic services.

name: Dermatologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent dermatologists providing skin disease diagnosis and treatment in public hospital settings.

name: Gastroenterologist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent gastroenterologists providing endoscopy and gastrointestinal specialist services.

name: Respiratory Physician FTE
description: Full-time equivalent respiratory and sleep medicine physicians in public hospital settings.

name: Aboriginal Health Worker Count
description: Total number of Aboriginal Health Workers delivering primary health care under supervision in ACCHOs and mainstream services.

name: ATSIHP Headcount
description: Total number of AHPRA-registered Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Health Practitioners.

name: ATSIHP-to-Indigenous Population Ratio
description: Number of registered Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander Health Practitioners per 1,000 Indigenous population.

name: ACCHO FTE
description: Total full-time equivalent staff across Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Organisations.

name: ACCHO GP Count
description: Total number of GPs working in Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Organisations.

name: ACCHO Nurse Count
description: Total number of registered and enrolled nurses employed across ACCHO services.

name: IAHP GP Equivalent Service Hours
description: Total primary care consultation hours delivered under the Indigenous Australians' Health Programme.

name: Indigenous Patient Journey Worker Count
description: Total number of Indigenous Patient Journey officers facilitating hospital care navigation and discharge planning.

name: Cultural Liaison Officer Count
description: Total number of cultural liaison and cultural safety officers in public health facilities.

name: Indigenous Allied Health Worker Count
description: Total number of Indigenous-identified workers in allied health roles across all settings.

name: Indigenous Medical Graduate Count
description: Annual number of Indigenous medical graduates completing their degree from an Australian medical school.

name: Remote Indigenous GP Count
description: Total number of GPs providing services in remote and very remote communities with significant Indigenous populations.

name: Social and Emotional Wellbeing Worker Count
description: Total number of social and emotional wellbeing workers in community and clinical settings.

name: Indigenous Mental Health Worker Count
description: Total number of Indigenous-identified workers in mental health roles across all settings.

name: Birthing on Country Midwife Count
description: Total number of midwives trained in culturally safe Birthing on Country models of care.

name: Close the Gap PBS Coverage Rate
description: Proportion of eligible Indigenous patients enrolled in the Closing the Gap PBS co-payment measure.

name: MBS 715 Claim Rate
description: Annual rate of Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander health assessments claimed per 100 eligible Indigenous patients.

name: Indigenous Preventive Care Plan Rate
description: Proportion of Indigenous patients in a PHN with an active preventive care plan on file.

name: Cultural Safety Training Completion Rate
description: Proportion of health workforce with current completion of accredited Aboriginal cultural safety training in a PHN region.

name: Indigenous Health Scholarship Recipients
description: Annual number of Indigenous students receiving health workforce scholarships through Commonwealth programs.

name: Remote Clinic FTE (Indigenous)
description: Full-time equivalent clinicians working in government-funded primary care clinics in remote Indigenous communities.

name: Telehealth Penetration Rate (Remote Indigenous)
description: Proportion of specialist consultations delivered via telehealth to remote Indigenous community residents.

name: ACCHO Accreditation Rate
description: Proportion of Aboriginal Community Controlled Health Organisations holding current accreditation against RACGP standards.

name: Ear Health Practitioner Count
description: Total number of audiologists and ear health workers providing services to Indigenous communities with high burden of otitis media.

name: Tackling Indigenous Smoking Worker Count
description: Total number of workers delivering smoking cessation programs targeted to Aboriginal and Torres Strait Islander populations.

name: Workforce Supply Index
description: Composite index of practitioner availability relative to population need across all primary health professions.

name: Workforce Demand Index
description: Composite index of population health need and care demand relative to supply across a PHN region.

name: Workforce Sustainability Score
description: Composite measure of workforce stability including turnover, vacancy, age distribution, and training pipeline metrics.

name: Projected Workforce Gap (5-Year)
description: Estimated FTE shortfall or surplus across all disciplines in five years based on current trends.

name: Projected Workforce Gap (10-Year)
description: Estimated FTE shortfall or surplus across all disciplines in ten years based on demographic and training pipeline data.

name: Workforce Aging Index
description: Proportion of the health workforce aged 55 and over, indicating near-term retirement succession pressure.

name: Gender Balance Ratio
description: Ratio of female to male health workers across a discipline, used to model flexible working pattern demand.

name: Part-Time Employment Rate
description: Proportion of the health workforce working less than full-time hours across a PHN or speciality.

name: Locum Dependency Rate
description: Proportion of total clinical service hours delivered by locum or agency-sourced practitioners across all settings.

name: Cross-Sector Mobility Rate
description: Proportion of practitioners who move between public, private, and community health sectors within a 12-month period.

name: Workforce Wellbeing Index
description: Composite score from standardised workforce surveys measuring burnout, job satisfaction, and psychological safety.

name: Burnout Prevalence Rate
description: Proportion of clinicians reporting high levels of emotional exhaustion on a validated burnout instrument.

name: Workforce Absenteeism Rate
description: Mean sick leave days taken per FTE per year across a health organisation or sector.

name: Scope of Practice Utilisation Rate
description: Proportion of health professionals working at or near their full registered scope of practice.

name: Team-Based Care Adoption Rate
description: Proportion of primary care practices operating with a formalised multidisciplinary team-based care model.

name: Advanced Practice Uptake Rate
description: Proportion of eligible clinicians practising at an advanced or extended scope of practice level.

name: First Nations Workforce Proportion
description: Share of the total health workforce who identify as Aboriginal or Torres Strait Islander.

name: CALD Workforce Proportion
description: Share of the health workforce who speak a language other than English as their primary language.

name: Mandatory Training Completion Rate
description: Proportion of health workers with current completion of mandatory organisation or sector training requirements.

name: CPD Hours per FTE
description: Average annual continuing professional development hours completed per FTE across a health workforce cohort.

name: Credentialling Compliance Rate
description: Proportion of medical practitioners with current credentialling for their scope of clinical practice at their facility.

name: Fitness to Practice Notification Rate
description: Rate of fitness to practice notifications per 1,000 registered health practitioners in a 12-month period.

name: Dual Role Clinician-Manager Proportion
description: Share of health practitioners who hold both clinical and management responsibilities in their current role.

name: Workforce Diversity Index
description: Composite measure of gender, cultural, linguistic, and Indigenous representation in a health workforce cohort.

name: New Entrant Retention Rate (3-Year)
description: Proportion of newly registered health practitioners still active in their profession three years after initial registration.

name: Chronic Disease Patient Prevalence
description: Proportion of the registered GP population with at least one chronic condition on their patient record.

name: Diabetes Management Plan Rate
description: Number of GP Diabetes Management Plans (MBS 721) prepared per 1,000 patients with type 2 diabetes.

name: Cardiovascular Risk Assessment Rate
description: Proportion of eligible patients receiving an absolute cardiovascular risk assessment in a 24-month period.

name: Bowel Cancer Screening Participation Rate
description: Proportion of eligible 50-74 year olds completing a FOBT test through the National Bowel Cancer Screening Program.

name: Breast Screening Participation Rate
description: Proportion of eligible women aged 50-74 attending BreastScreen Australia in a two-year screening round.

name: Cervical Screening Participation Rate
description: Proportion of women aged 25-74 with a current cervical screening test result on the National Cancer Screening Register.

name: Health Assessment (75+) Rate
description: Number of MBS 75-and-over annual health assessments claimed per 1,000 eligible patients.

name: Enhanced Primary Care Allied Health Item Rate
description: Number of EPC allied health referral items claimed per 1,000 patients with a chronic condition.

name: Potentially Preventable Hospitalisation Rate
description: Rate of hospital admissions for ambulatory care sensitive conditions per 1,000 population in a PHN.

name: GP Management Plan Rate
description: Number of GP Management Plans (MBS 721) prepared per 1,000 patients with chronic conditions.

name: Team Care Arrangement Rate
description: Number of Team Care Arrangements (MBS 723) prepared per 1,000 chronic disease patients.

name: Home Medicines Review Rate
description: Number of Home Medicines Reviews completed per 1,000 patients prescribed five or more regular medicines.

name: Medication Reconciliation Rate
description: Proportion of hospital admissions and discharges with a documented medicines reconciliation completed.

name: Smoking Cessation Counselling Rate
description: Proportion of GP consultations with a current smoker where cessation counselling was documented.

name: Alcohol Screening Rate
description: Proportion of GP consultations where an AUDIT-C or AUDIT-10 screening tool was documented.

name: COPD Management Plan Rate
description: Number of COPD management plans prepared per 1,000 patients with a confirmed COPD diagnosis.

name: Asthma Action Plan Coverage
description: Proportion of patients with a recorded asthma diagnosis who have a current written asthma action plan.

name: Hypertension Control Rate
description: Proportion of patients with diagnosed hypertension achieving blood pressure below 140/90 mmHg in a 12-month period.

name: HbA1c Monitoring Rate
description: Proportion of patients with type 2 diabetes with an HbA1c test result recorded within the past 12 months.

name: Mental Health Care Plan Rate
description: Number of GP Mental Health Care Plans prepared per 1,000 population per annum.

name: Social Prescribing Referral Rate
description: Number of social prescribing referrals made per 1,000 active patients in participating primary care practices.

name: Multidisciplinary Case Conference Rate
description: Number of multidisciplinary care planning case conferences held per 1,000 complex chronic disease patients.

name: Preventive Health Check Completion Rate
description: Proportion of patients in defined at-risk groups completing preventive health assessments within recommended intervals.

name: Health Literacy Assessment Rate
description: Proportion of primary care patients assessed for health literacy using a validated screening tool.

name: Immunisation Coverage Rate (65+)
description: Proportion of adults aged 65 and over with current pneumococcal and annual influenza vaccinations recorded.

name: Community Pharmacist FTE
description: Full-time equivalent pharmacists working in community pharmacy settings including dispensing and clinical services.

name: Hospital Pharmacist-to-Bed Ratio
description: Number of hospital pharmacists per 100 occupied acute care beds across public hospitals.

name: RMMR Rate
description: Number of Residential Medication Management Reviews completed per 100 residential aged care residents per year.

name: Pharmacist Prescriber Count
description: Total number of pharmacists accredited to prescribe under collaborative prescribing arrangements.

name: Polypharmacy Prevalence Rate
description: Proportion of patients aged 65 and over prescribed five or more regular medicines concurrently.

name: Adverse Drug Event Rate
description: Rate of preventable adverse drug events identified per 1,000 inpatient admissions.

name: PBS Expenditure per Capita
description: Annual per capita Pharmaceutical Benefits Scheme expenditure for a PHN region population.

name: Opioid Substitution Therapy Patient Count
description: Total number of patients enrolled in opioid pharmacotherapy programs in a region.

name: Antibiotic Stewardship Compliance Rate
description: Proportion of antibiotic prescriptions in hospital settings that comply with Therapeutic Guidelines recommendations.

name: Vaccine Cold Chain Compliance Rate
description: Proportion of vaccine storage audits in general practice achieving compliance with cold chain requirements.

name: 6CPA Program Participation Rate
description: Proportion of community pharmacies actively delivering services under Sixth Community Pharmacy Agreement programs.

name: Dose Administration Aid Use Rate
description: Proportion of patients receiving medicines in a dose administration aid across community and aged care settings.

name: HMR Completion Time
description: Median days from GP referral to completed Home Medicines Review report returned to the practice.

name: Medication Adherence Rate
description: Proportion of patients on chronic disease medication who achieve greater than 80% adherence in a 12-month period.

name: Pharmacist Graduate Placement Rate
description: Proportion of pharmacy graduates securing a supervised intern year placement within six months of graduation.

name: Midwife-to-Birth Ratio
description: Number of registered midwives per 100 publicly funded births in a health district.

name: Antenatal Care First Visit Rate
description: Proportion of pregnant women attending their first antenatal care visit before 14 weeks gestation.

name: Public Hospital Birth Rate
description: Proportion of total births occurring in public hospital settings compared to private and homebirths.

name: Caesarean Section Rate
description: Proportion of all births delivered by caesarean section across public hospital maternity services.

name: NICU Nurse FTE
description: Full-time equivalent nurses working in neonatal intensive care and special care nursery settings.

name: Child and Family Health Nurse Count
description: Total number of registered nurses providing community child health assessment and parent support services.

name: Maternal and Child Health Home Visit Rate
description: Proportion of families with a newborn receiving at least one home visit by a maternal and child health nurse.

name: Breastfeeding Initiation Rate
description: Proportion of newborns documented as commencing breastfeeding at birth across public hospital maternity services.

name: Postnatal Depression Screening Rate
description: Proportion of postnatal women screened for perinatal depression using the Edinburgh Postnatal Depression Scale.

name: Neonatal Mortality Rate
description: Deaths occurring within the first 28 days of life per 1,000 live births in a health region.

name: Low Birth Weight Rate
description: Proportion of live births with a birth weight of less than 2,500 grams.

name: Lactation Consultant Count
description: Total number of International Board Certified Lactation Consultants providing breastfeeding support services.

name: Early Childhood Immunisation Rate (12 months)
description: Proportion of children fully immunised at 12 months according to the National Immunisation Program schedule.

name: Child Development Check Completion Rate
description: Proportion of children completing age-appropriate developmental surveillance assessments at 12, 24, and 36 months.

name: Family Violence Safe Enquiry Rate
description: Proportion of antenatal consultations where a validated safe enquiry about family violence was documented.

name: Maternal Mortality Rate
description: Deaths of women during pregnancy or within 42 days of delivery per 100,000 live births.

name: Obstetric High Dependency Beds
description: Number of designated obstetric high dependency and maternal critical care beds in public hospitals.

name: Group B Streptococcus Screening Rate
description: Proportion of pregnant women screened for Group B Streptococcus between 35 and 37 weeks gestation.

name: Third and Fourth Degree Perineal Tear Rate
description: Proportion of vaginal births complicated by third or fourth degree perineal lacerations requiring repair.

name: Paediatric Nurse FTE (Community)
description: Full-time equivalent community paediatric nurses providing developmental assessment and chronic condition support.

name: My Health Record Registered Population
description: Proportion of the Australian population with an active My Health Record.

name: Electronic Prescribing Adoption Rate
description: Proportion of prescriptions generated electronically rather than on paper in a PHN.

name: Shared Health Summary Upload Rate
description: Proportion of general practice patients with an active Shared Health Summary uploaded to My Health Record.

name: Clinical Decision Support Alert Acknowledgement Rate
description: Proportion of electronic prescribing decision support alerts acknowledged by clinicians in hospital settings.

name: Telehealth Consultation Volume
description: Total number of Medicare-billed telehealth consultations per 1,000 population per annum.

name: Patient-Reported Outcome Measure Collection Rate
description: Proportion of eligible patient episodes with a PROM collected through a digital platform.

name: EHR Interoperability Score
description: Composite score measuring the ability of hospital and primary care electronic health record systems to exchange data.

name: Clinician Digital Health Literacy Rate
description: Proportion of clinicians in a health setting who have completed a validated digital health literacy assessment.

name: Clinical System Downtime Hours
description: Total annual unplanned downtime hours for mission-critical hospital clinical information systems.

name: Secure Messaging Adoption Rate
description: Proportion of GP-to-specialist referrals and clinical correspondence sent via secure messaging rather than fax or post.

name: Wearable Device Integration Rate
description: Proportion of patients with a chronic condition actively sharing wearable device data with their primary care provider.

name: AI-Assisted Clinical Decision Tool Usage Rate
description: Proportion of clinical encounters where an AI-assisted diagnostic or treatment support tool was accessed.

name: Digital Mental Health Platform Engagement Rate
description: Proportion of Better Access patients who have accessed at least one publicly funded digital mental health service.

name: Population Health Analytics Dashboard Usage Rate
description: Proportion of PHN staff and commissioned service providers accessing population health dashboards for planning purposes.

name: Cybersecurity Incident Rate (Health)
description: Annual rate of reportable cybersecurity incidents per 100 health organisations in a jurisdiction.
